# BTC Benchmark

## Goal

Make important observations and improve candidate strategies for the frozen BTC 1h benchmark without weakening referee rules, causality gates, costs, splits, or sealed-holdout protection.

## Contract

| Field | State |
| --- | --- |
| Task ID | `btc_benchmark` |
| Status | `active` |
| Metric | `referee_dev_score`, maximize |
| Sources | `btc_benchmark` |
| Observability | wandb_weave `sungsoo-ahn/ai-lab`, required |

## Loop

| Field | State |
| --- | --- |
| Mode | `continuous` |
| Max cycles | `5` |
| Max wall minutes | `180` |
| Stop file | `STOP` |

## Clean Start

No experiment code, assets, reports, plots, results, or run logs are tracked as canonical repo state. Those files are local experiment logs and are ignored by Git.

## Constraints

- Do not modify benchmark scoring, cost model, train/test split, causality gates, or sealed holdout policy.
- Keep experiment code, assets, reports, plots, results, and run logs local under ignored task artifact directories.
- External submissions require explicit user approval.

## Workspace

- `tasks/btc_benchmark/bin/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/code/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/results/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/plots/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/reports/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/runs/`
- `tasks/btc_benchmark/assets/`

## Run

```bash
uv run python bin/ai-lab task validate btc_benchmark
uv run python bin/ai-lab task run btc_benchmark --once --dry-run
uv run python bin/ai-lab task run btc_benchmark --continuous
```
